description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomy was traveling southwest on Harrison St and turning right onto 13th Street on a green traffic signal. 
While executing the turn, the Zoox vehicle braked to achieve a minimal risk condition due to an unexpected system fault, the safety operator 
disengaged, and then was rear ended by a passenger car (Vehicle 2) that was also turning directly behind the Zoox vehicle. The rear bumper 
cover and rear radar unit on the Zoox vehicle sustained damage. The hood, front grille and front bumper cover on the passenger car appeared
 to have sustained damage. There were no reported injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
